desktop.heading: Why this matters for AI oversight
desktop.bodyParagraph: AI answers are entering workflows, research, compliance, customer support, policy analysis, and decision support. Institutions need to know not only whether a model can answer a question, but what kind of answer it tends to volunteer when the user does not already know the right term to ask about.
desktop.pullLine: Institutions need visibility into what models surface, omit, and change over time.
